resultList.dtldesc: Experience the advantage of living in the heart of Chennais IT corridor with this well-positioned 3 BHK apartment in Blossom Apartment, Thoraipakkam. This residence offers an excellent opportunity for professionals and families seeking a home that combines urban convenience with a well-established residential setting. With its functional design and proximity to major commercial hubs, this property is a standout choice for those looking to settle in one of Chennais most dynamic neighbourhoods.Property SpecificationsThis apartment features a super built-up area of 1090 sq. ft and is situated on the 1st floor of a 2-storey building. The unit is unfurnished, providing a blank canvas for the new owners to customise their living space according to their preferences. The layout includes three bedrooms, three bathrooms, and a private balcony. With a construction age of 10 to 15 years, the property is well-maintained and ready for immediate occupation. The residence is part of a boutique project consisting of only 12 units, ensuring a sense of community and privacy.FacilitiesThe property is equipped with basic essential facilities to ensure a comfortable daily life. As a resale unit in an established project, it benefits from the existing infrastructure of the Blossom Apartment complex. The low-rise nature of the building ensures easy access and a more intimate living environment compared to large-scale developments. The apartment is ready to move in, allowing for a quick and straightforward transition for the buyer.LocalityThe apartment is strategically located in PTC Quarters, Thoraipakkam, a locality highly favoured for its proximity to the Old Mahabalipuram Road OMR IT corridor. It is exceptionally well-connected to major commercial parks, including Asv Suntech Park, which is only 0.4 kilometres away, and Techbrain Networks. For families, the area is served by reputable educational institutions like the APL Global School and Misrimal Navajee Munoth Jain Engineering College. Residents also enjoy excellent access to shopping and entertainment options, with BSR Mall and Grand Square DLF Mall located nearby. The neighbourhoods robust transport network and comprehensive social infrastructure make it a highly desirable destination in South Chennai.
